name: wtr-lab-term-replacer-webpack
description: A modular, Webpack-powered TypeScript version of the WTR Lab Term Replacer userscript.
author: MasuRii

scripts.build:performance: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.cjs --config-name performance --mode=production
scripts.build:greasyfork: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.cjs --config-name greasyfork --mode=production
scripts.build:devbundle: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.cjs --config-name dev --mode=development
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && node scripts/validate-userscript.cjs
